Description: Student phone numbers or order history leaked during checkout
Mitigation_Strategy: Implement HTTPS encryption and mask sensitive phone data on screen

Description: Unauthorized access to canteen vendor admin panel
Mitigation_Strategy: Require multi-factor authentication or secure vendor credentials

Description: Using uncredited canteen logos or copyrighted UI icon sets
Mitigation_Strategy: Use open-source MIT icons (Lucide/FontAwesome) and free royalty image

Description: Database crash during peak lunch hours (11 AM - 1 PM)
Mitigation_Strategy: Set up auto-scaling cloud database instances and local caching
